author: parithosh
content:
Hey! We decided to take this on ourselves, we're gonna be doing a sprint on it. You can see the first bits here:
https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1326
https://github.com/ethpandaops/mcp/blob/master/runbooks/debug_devnet.md

So we're doing skills + plugins for tackling tool use. The approach seems to be very token efficient. We're going to try building more complicated things on top as we improve confidence.
